title: Narrative Profile — Unit Observables Context
description: Profile overlay schema constraining unit.observables.context for the narrative profile. Applies when profile='narrative'.

focalizer.description: Entity ref of the perceiving character. REQUIRED for unit_type 'scene'.

pov.description: Point of view type. REQUIRED for unit_type 'scene'.

setting.description: Entity ref of the location. SHOULD resolve to entity_type 'location'.

diegetic_level.description: Genette diegetic level (e.g., extradiegetic, intradiegetic, metadiegetic).

duration_mode.description: Genette duration (ellipsis, summary, scene, stretch, pause).
